expected_behavior: Required events are append-only/tamper-evident, queryable by tenant/action/decision, and modification/removal is detected.
given: VS2 generates access, denial, policy update, RLS anomaly, egress, approval, connector, and rollback events.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Event inventory, verification success, tamper detection failure evidence.
then: Required events are append-only/tamper-evident, queryable by tenant/action/decision, and modification/removal is detected.
verification_method: Audit contract tests and tamper fixture.
when: Audit verification and deliberate tampering run.
